title: Paris — City of Light data

itinerary.description: Transfer GRU.

title: Buenos Aires — Paris of South America
description: Milonga tango halls, world-record steaks, European belle époque architecture, and La Bombonera stadium's passionate Boca Juniors — BA is pure passion.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Plaza de Mayo
itinerary.description: Arrive EZE, check-in, Plaza de Mayo evening.

itinerary.title: La Boca & San Telmo
itinerary.description: Caminito, Boca Juniors stadium, Sunday antique market.

itinerary.title: Recoleta & Palermo
itinerary.description: Recoleta Cemetery, Palermo parks, tango evening.

itinerary.title: Day Trip Iguazu
itinerary.description: Fly to Iguazu Falls, Devil's Throat walkway.

itinerary.title: Puerto Madero
itinerary.description: Ecological reserve, steak dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer EZE.

title: Lima — Gastronomic Capital of the Americas
description: Lima houses Latin America's finest restaurant (Central) and the continent's most vibrant ceviche culture, all above dramatic Pacific cliffs.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Miraflores
itinerary.description: Arrive LIM, check-in, Miraflores Malecón sunset.

itinerary.title: Historic Centre & Larco

itinerary.title: Gastronomy Day
itinerary.description: Ceviche class, Surquillo market, Lima food tour.

itinerary.title: Departure / Connection to Cusco
itinerary.description: Transfer LIM.

title: Cusco & Machu Picchu — Inca Empire
tagline: Lost City, Sacred Valley & Andean Soul
description: Machu Picchu emerging from morning clouds is the most photographed sight in the Americas — and it exceeds every expectation.

itinerary.title: Arrive Cusco
itinerary.description: Arrive CUZ, acclimatise, San Blas neighbourhood.

itinerary.title: Cusco City
itinerary.description: Sacsayhuamán, Qorikancha Temple, Plaza de Armas.

itinerary.title: Sacred Valley
itinerary.description: Pisac market, Ollantaytambo fortress, Chinchero.

itinerary.title: Machu Picchu
itinerary.description: Train to Aguas Calientes, Machu Picchu sunrise tour.

itinerary.title: Rainbow Mountain
itinerary.description: Vinicunca Rainbow Mountain hike.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer CUZ.

title: Cape Town — Mother City
description: A cable car to the flat-topped mountain, penguins at Boulders Beach, and the world's most scenic wine route — Cape Town delivers.

itinerary.description: Arrive CPT, check-in, V&A Waterfront evening.

itinerary.title: Table Mountain
itinerary.description: Cable car, Camps Bay beach sunset.

itinerary.description: Cape of Good Hope, Boulders Beach penguins, Chapman's Peak.

itinerary.title: Winelands

itinerary.title: Garden Route
itinerary.description: Drive to Hermanus, whale watching.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer CPT.

title: Marrakesh — The Red City
description: Get happily lost in labyrinthine souks, sleep in a centuries-old riad, and venture to the Sahara for a night under the dunes.

itinerary.description: Arrive RAK, riad check-in, Djemaa el-Fna evening.

itinerary.title: Atlas Mountains Day Trip

itinerary.title: Hammam & Medina Evening
itinerary.description: Traditional hammam, rooftop dinner medina.

itinerary.title: Departure

title: Cairo — Cradle of Civilization
description: Stand before the last surviving wonder of the ancient world. Cruise the Nile. Explore Khan el-Khalili. Cairo is humbling.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Old Cairo
itinerary.description: Arrive CAI, check-in, Old Cairo Coptic churches.

itinerary.title: Pyramids & Sphinx
itinerary.description: Full day Giza plateau, camel ride, Sound & Light show.

itinerary.title: Egyptian Museum
itinerary.description: Tutankhamun treasures, mummies, 120,000 artefacts.

itinerary.title: Saqqara & Memphis

itinerary.title: Khan el-Khalili & Nile

title: Nairobi & Safari — Wild Heart of Africa
description: Witness the Great Migration, track lions at dawn, and sleep under a sky brilliant with stars — Africa's wildlife is life-changing.

itinerary.description: Arrive NBO, check-in, Giraffe Centre evening.

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Masai Mara

title: Victoria Falls — Smoke That Thunders
description: Standing in the spray of the world's largest waterfall, bungee jumping over the Zambezi Gorge, and a sundowner cruise on the river.

itinerary.description: Transfer VFA.

title: Sydney — Harbour of Dreams
description: The Opera House at sunrise, Bondi's golden surf, and the wild Blue Mountains just an hour away — Sydney is effortlessly world-class.

description: Espresso culture in graffiti-covered laneways, AFL football fever, world-class galleries, and the Great Ocean Road's dramatic cliffs.

description: Subtropical Brisbane is the gateway to the Great Barrier Reef, Fraser Island, and the Gold Coast's theme parks, all within easy reach.

title: Auckland — City of Sails
description: A city built on 53 volcanoes, surrounded by the Hauraki Gulf, with world-class wine on a ferry-ride island — Auckland is nature's playground.

title: Queenstown — Adventure Capital of the World
description: Nestled among The Remarkables mountain range, Queenstown is the global headquarters of adrenaline — and breathtaking calm.

tagline: Mughal Grandeur, Street Food & New India
description: Seven cities layered into one — from Mughal Red Fort to India Gate, from Chandni Chowk's chaotic bazaars to Lutyens' imperial avenues.

description: One building built with the tears of twenty thousand craftsmen, now drawing twenty million visitors a year — the Taj Mahal never disappoints.
